member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashEntriesCommand
member.summary: Input command used to update cash transaction entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashEntryDto
member.summary: Output DTO for a cash ledger transaction entry.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashLedgerQuery
member.summary: Input query DTO used to retrieve cash ledger transactions.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashTransactionAnalysisEntry
member.summary: Output DTO that holds a result entry of a cash leger transaction analysis.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashTransactionHolderDto
member.summary: Output holder DTO used for a cash transaction.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.Adapters.CashTransactionMapper
member.summary: Provides mapping services for cash ledger transactions.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.CashTransactionAnalyzer
member.summary: Analyzes a cash transaction to determine the status of its entries.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.CashTransactionProcessor
member.summary: Process a cash transaction to determine their matching cash accounts.

member.name: T:Empiria.CashFlow.CashLedger.UseCases.CashTransactionUseCases
member.summary: Use cases used to retrieve and manage cash ledger transactions.
